svg.title: Umbraco major upgrade flow — three phases
svg.desc: Three-phase upgrade diagram. Phase 1 upgrades Dev locally. A might-fail arrow goes from Dev to Staging. Content freeze spans Phases 2 and 3. Phase 2 migrates Staging via local DB connection string. Phase 3 deploys from Staging to Live then migrates Live via local DB connection string.
svg.text: 1. Deploy v17 code from Staging to Live
Example uses v13 → v17. Applies to all major Umbraco Cloud upgrades.
